title: Roadmap Next-Task Suggester
purpose: Suggest the next safe bounded roadmap task from repo-local roadmap, routine-spec, runnable-command, and optional ledger state without mutating repository or orchestration state.
trigger: Run when the orchestrator needs a conservative next-task recommendation from docs/roadmap.md and repo-local state before dispatching more work.
allowedActions: parse runnable routine ids from source
compare implemented routine ids against roadmap candidate names
inspect optional repo-local ledger task state read-only
write a RoutineRunReport JSON when requested
forbiddenActions: stage, commit, merge, push, tag, or release
dispatch sessions or start nested subagents
claim direct or proxy runtime proof from static planning evidence
gates: candidate suggestions filtered against implemented routines and optional active repo-local ledger tasks
report uses only local or blocked evidence

evidence.direct: Reserved for future human-reviewed or runtime-backed prioritization proof; the MVP does not emit direct proof.
evidence.proxy: Reserved for future accepted external planning artifacts; the MVP normally does not emit proxy proof.
evidence.local: Local roadmap, source, routine-spec, and optional ledger inspection.
evidence.blocked: Roadmap, source, routine-spec, or optional ledger inputs could not be inspected safely or were too ambiguous.

escalation: Stop if docs/roadmap.md or runnable routine source cannot be inspected.
Do not mutate the ledger or dispatch work from this routine; report only a suggestion.
Escalate when the remaining roadmap items are too ambiguous to classify as a bounded safe task.
